steps.title: Apply the new function definition
steps.content: A product of two factors $(x-14)(x+19)$ is a parabola opening upward with vertex midway between the roots.

steps.title: Compute the answer
steps.content: The minimum occurs at $x = \frac{14 + (-19)}{2} = \frac{-5}{2} = -2.5$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
